ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-24-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERNCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL AND EXTENDING DISCOCERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). CONDITIONAL THAT THE DEPOSITIONS OF ALL COMPLAINANTS TO BE COMPLETED BY 11/17/06. ALL OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY SHALL BE PROVIDED BY 11/3/06. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 11/30/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. THIS MATTER SHALL BE SINGLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER IN DEPARTMENT 505 FOR ALL PURPOSES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. ALL PARTIES WAIVE TIME REQIREMENTS PURSUIANT TO CCP 437(C). PENDING WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: R. GOULDING; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (206)
